description: The online store's catalog needs immediate pricing adjustments due to market changes. Update the product prices using the WooCommerce Bulk Edit functionality to preserve original product IDs. Increase the Regular Price of all products in the 'Coffee Beans' category by exactly 20% and decrease the Regular Price of all products in the 'Brewing Equipment' category by exactly $15. Do not modify the prices of any products in the 'Merchandise' category.
